{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Sacred Valley Jade
| introduced = Bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Sacred Valley Jade]] did not know a [[Ruler attack]] was the correct tool to use against [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13">''Bloodline'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
